brief_html: This message will request a fast version check. Now works with all products.
format:
(UINT32) Product ID
(UINT32) Version DLL digit
(STRING) Checksum formula.
remarks_html:
This message will request a fast version check. Now works with all products.

Version DLL Digit must be in the range 0-7. (For example, for IX86Ver1.mpq this is 1)

See the BNLS Product Codes document for a list of valid product codes.

comments.content_html: if someone could, please update this list JBLS supports more products
